info.title: SimpleHost API
info.description: SimpleHost.dev lets you publish any file or directory to a live URL in seconds. Built for AI agents. The publish flow is a 3-step process: Create (send file manifest, get upload URLs), Upload (PUT files to the provided URLs), Finalize (make the site live).

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Two-step email verification to obtain an API key. No authentication header required for these endpoints.

tags.name: Publish
tags.description: Create, update, finalize, and manage published sites. The core publish flow is Create -> Upload -> Finalize.

tags.name: Handle
tags.description: Manage vanity subdomains (e.g., yourname.simplehost.dev). Requires the Hobby plan.

post.description: Sends a verification code (format XXXX-XXXX) to the provided email address. The user must read the code from their email and provide it to the agent. Codes expire after 10 minutes. There is a 60-second cooldown between requests for the same email.

example.message: Verification code sent to your email

example.error: A valid email address is required

429.description: Rate limited — too many code requests

example.error: Please wait before requesting another code

post.summary: Verify code and get API key
post.description: Verifies the email code and returns an API key. If the email is new, an account is created. If the email already exists, a new API key is generated (the old one is invalidated). The API key is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later. Max 5 verification attempts per code.

200.description: Existing user verified — new API key issued

example.message: Verified! Here is your API key.
example.warning: IMPORTANT: Save this API key now. It is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

201.description: New user created — API key issued

example.message: Account created! Here is your API key.
example.warning: IMPORTANT: Save this API key now. It is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

post.description: Creates a new site by sending a file manifest. Returns upload URLs for each file. After uploading all files, call the finalize endpoint to make the site live. Authentication is optional — without it, the site is anonymous and expires in 24 hours. Anonymous sites return a claimToken that can be used later to transfer ownership.

400.description: Invalid request body or file manifest

example.error: files array is required and must not be empty

put.description: Publishes a new version of an existing site. Send the full file manifest. Files with matching SHA-256 hashes are automatically skipped (server copies them from the previous version). Only non-matching files need to be re-uploaded. After uploading, call finalize to make the new version live.

200.description: New version created — upload URLs returned for changed files

400.description: Invalid request body or file manifest

example.error: files array is required and must not be empty

get.description: Returns full details about a site including its file list, metadata, status, and version information. Only the site owner can access this endpoint.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a site. Removes all versions, files from storage (R2), and associated database records. This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Finalizes a pending site version after all files have been uploaded. Verifies that every file in the manifest has been uploaded to storage, then activates the version. The site becomes live at its URL immediately. For anonymous sites, no auth header is needed.

400.description: Invalid request — missing versionId, version mismatch, or files not yet uploaded

get.description: Returns all sites owned by the authenticated user, ordered by most recently updated. Includes basic metadata and file counts for each site. Deleted sites are excluded.

post.description: Creates a complete copy of a site under a new slug. All files are copied server-side in storage — no client upload is needed. The new site is immediately active. Only the site owner can duplicate it.

400.description: Site has no active version to duplicate

example.error: Site has no active version to duplicate

patch.description: Updates site metadata such as title, description, OG image path, password protection, and TTL. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated. Set a field to null to clear it. Passwords are hashed server-side. Setting ttlSeconds also updates the expiresAt timestamp.

400.description: No fields to update or invalid JSON

post.description: Transfers ownership of an anonymous site to the authenticated user's account. Requires the claimToken that was returned when the anonymous site was created. Once claimed, the site becomes permanent (no expiry) and is linked to the user's account.

example.message: Site claimed successfully! It is now permanent and linked to your account.

400.description: Invalid claim token, site already claimed, or site is not anonymous

example.error: Authentication required. Include your API key in the Authorization header.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's current vanity handle (subdomain). If no handle is set, the handle field is null.

put.description: Claims or changes the user's vanity handle (e.g., yourname.simplehost.dev). Requires the Hobby plan ($5/mo). Handle must be 3-30 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens, cannot start or end with a hyphen. Reserved names (www, api, app, admin, etc.) are not allowed.

400.description: Invalid handle, reserved, or already taken

example.error: Invalid handle. Must be 3-30 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens, cannot start or end with a hyphen.

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained from the auth flow. Format: sh_live_ followed by 32 hex characters. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer sh_live_...

email.description: The email address to send the verification code to

expiresInSeconds.description: Seconds until the verification code expires (600 = 10 minutes)

email.description: The email address used in request-code

code.description: The verification code from the email (format: XXXX-XXXX)

apiKey.description: The API key. Format: sh_live_ + 32 hex chars. Shown only once.

isNewUser.description: True if a new account was created

warning.description: Reminder to save the API key

path.description: Relative file path. No leading slash, no '..' traversal, max 500 chars.

size.description: File size in bytes. Must be positive.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash (64 lowercase hex chars). Enables dedup on updates — files with matching hashes are skipped.

title.description: Page title shown in the browser tab and OG tags

ogImagePath.description: Path to the OG image file (must be included in the files array)

files.description: File manifest. Max 1000 files per site.

path.description: The file path this upload corresponds to

method.description: HTTP method to use for the upload

url.description: The URL to PUT the file content to

headers.description: Headers to include with the upload request

path.description: The file path that was skipped

versionId.description: ULID version identifier. Pass this to the finalize endpoint.

uploads.description: Files that need to be uploaded by the client

skipped.description: Files that were skipped because their hash matched a previous version

finalizeUrl.description: The URL to POST to after all uploads are complete

expiresInSeconds.description: Seconds until the upload URLs expire (3600 = 1 hour)

siteUrl.description: The live URL where the site will be accessible

claimToken.description: Token to claim an anonymous site later. Only returned for anonymous publishes. Shown only once.

claimUrl.description: URL to claim the anonymous site via browser. Only returned for anonymous publishes.

expiresAt.description: When the anonymous site expires (24 hours). Only returned for anonymous publishes.

anonymous.description: True if the site was published without authentication

warning.description: Reminder to save the claim token. Only returned for anonymous publishes.

versionId.description: The version ID returned from the create or update response at .upload.versionId

totalSize.description: Total size of all files in bytes

title.description: Page title. Set to null to clear.

description.description: Page description. Set to null to clear.

ogImagePath.description: Path to OG image file. Set to null to clear.

password.description: Password to protect the site. Set to null to remove password protection. Hashed server-side.

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds. Sets an expiration on the site. Set to null to remove expiration.

claimToken.description: The claim token returned when the anonymous site was created

owner.description: The email of the user who claimed the site

handle.description: The user's vanity handle, or null if not set

url.description: The handle URL, or null if no handle is set

handle.description: The desired handle. 3-30 chars, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens, cannot start or end with hyphen.
